_comment: Copy this to your PROJECT's .claude/team.config.json and adjust. These values ARE the built-in defaults — the interpreter behaves identically when the file is absent. Per-project config exists so role→agent/model/scope resolution is deterministic and explicit instead of inferred at runtime (P6).
_custom_agents: roles values are passed verbatim to Task subagent_type. Use a bare name for a project (.claude/agents/) or user (~/.claude/agents/) agent, or 'plugin:agent' for another plugin's agent. Examples below: 'backend' could be a project agent 'my-go-backend', 'security-tester' could be 'acme-sec:pentester'.
_roster_overrides_example: Add/replace agents on a stage without editing workflows/*.json. Applied after the profile's conditional[] rules. Uncomment and adapt:
